creator: adam@adammccarthy.co.uk
text: I have over 8 years experience with FreeBSD and offer consulting in many areas, including general FreeBSD/Linux infrastructure, load balanced, highly available clustering, VOIP, network security and migration from proprietary systems to open source.  I am based in Birmingham, UK and you can visit my website at http://www.adammccarthy.co.uk or email me at adam@adammccarthy.co.uk
